title: cuscuta ortegana
intro: Cuscuta ortegana is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as dodder, which is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting itself to the stems of other plants. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. Its health benefits include potential treatment for conditions such as cancer, cardiovascular disease, and neurodegenerative disorders due to its ability to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation. Cuscuta ortegana can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
